title: Junior Project Manager
matched_skills: Proficiency in relevant software applications (Power BI, MS Office)
missing_skills: Construction or electrical industry experience (1-2 years required)
Knowledge of lightning protection systems, earthing, or surge protection
Familiarity with technical drawings and construction specifications
Health and safety regulations for construction/electrical installations
key_requirements: 1-2 years experience in construction or electrical industry (REQUIRED)
Knowledge of lightning protection, earthing, or surge protection (highly desirable)
Familiarity with technical drawings and industry standards
Ability to travel internationally for up to 75% of working time
Understanding of H&S regulations for construction/electrical
cv_highlights: Project coordination experience at Hapag-Lloyd and PMO at HSBC
Documentation, reporting, and progress tracking skills
gaps: CRITICAL: Zero construction or electrical industry background — this is a mandatory requirement
CRITICAL: No knowledge of lightning protection, earthing, or surge protection systems
CRITICAL: No experience with technical/construction drawings or site supervision
CRITICAL: Role demands 75% international travel — significant lifestyle constraint
No health and safety compliance experience in construction context
recommended_emphasis: Project documentation and reporting alignment with construction PM workflows
Language skills (English + German) as a differentiator
recommendation: Do not apply. This role has a hard requirement for 1-2 years of construction or electrical industry experience, and specific technical knowledge (lightning protection, earthing, technical drawings, H&S legislation) that Boru entirely lacks. The 75% travel requirement is also a significant barrier. Transferable PM skills are insufficient to overcome the domain-specific mandatory requirements.
